title: man-pages bug fix and enhancement update
overview: An update for Oracle Linux is now available for Oracle Linux 9.
description:
[6.04-9]
- madvise(2): madvise can return EBUSY on MADV_SOFT_OFFLINE requests.
  Resolves: RHEL-34105

[6.04-8]
- Document RWF_ATOMIC, STATX_ATTR_WRITE_ATOMIC flags (RHEL-87625)
full_text:
[6.04-9]
- madvise(2): madvise can return EBUSY on MADV_SOFT_OFFLINE requests.
  Resolves: RHEL-34105

[6.04-8]
- Document RWF_ATOMIC, STATX_ATTR_WRITE_ATOMIC flags (RHEL-87625)
